{{CargoRelic
|name=Pharaoh's Authority
|class_id=20760
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Kemet has a long history, the pyramids are indestructible, Earth's will specifically modifies the Pharaoh's Authority, granting travelers the ability to confront the Demon God's forces! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=18
|art=15
|fth=30
|civ=14
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Kemet Apostles defeated:10/10 
|ss2=Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +6<br>Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +6<br>Kemet Apostles defeated:10/10 
|ss3=Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +9<br>Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +9<br>Kemet Apostles defeated:10/10 
|ss4=Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +9<br>Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +9<br>Kemet Apostles defeated:10/10 
|ss7=Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +9<br>Per Kemet Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +9<br>Kemet Apostles defeated:10/10 <br> (Awakened)
}}
